title: Springy Dutch Cream Bake
description: A nostalgic Dutch dessert featuring clotted cream and a nut-free friendly recipe that captures the essence of spring.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Butter a 9-inch ttukbaegi-earthenware-cook and set aside.
In a medium bowl, whisk together the flour, baking powder, and salt.
In a large bowl, use an electric mixer to beat the egg yolks and clotted cream until smooth.
Gradually add the granulated sugar to the egg yolk mixture and beat until combined.
With the mixer on low speed, gradually add the flour mixture to the egg yolk mixture and mix until just combined.
Beat in the softened butter until the mixture is smooth.
In a separate bowl, beat the egg whites until stiff peaks form.
Fold the egg whites into the egg yolk mixture until no white streaks remain.
Pour the batter into the prepared ttukbaegi-earthenware-cook and smooth the top.
Bake for 30 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
Remove from the oven and let cool in the pan for 5 minutes.
Transfer to a wire rack to cool completely.
Dust with confectioners' sugar before serving.
